reviews.school_name: St. John's English School and Junior College - Besant Nagar
reviews.author: Jason
reviews.review_body: This school might look good from the outside but it's really bad, it's not about the teachers.. in 8th grade C section some people were doing drugs and smoking in the lab, if you see this please DO NOT join this school for your future, there are many students speaking bad words and everyone are speaking in tamil even though it is a English school, some teachers do not care about your studies.. This school was good 20 years ago, but not now, this school should be at the bottom of your list

reviews.school_name: St. John's English School and Junior College - Besant Nagar
reviews.author: Meryl Kathrina
reviews.review_body:
Thanking God for this wonderful school. The best school you could ever ever wish for in your life. I was a Johnian and I’m still a Johnian. The management is really wonderful in training the kids. After finishing schooling at St.John’s Besant Nagar, the kids will come out with shining colours and be a Blessing to the society.
God bless you St.John’s❤️

reviews.school_name: St. John's English School and Junior College - Besant Nagar
reviews.author: Sunandha Jadhav
reviews.review_body: Worst school ever. They will call us for an interview and waste our time. They will want us to work in front office even if you have two professional degree. The Principal and correspondent are liars. They will tell something to sugarcoat things don't trust them blindly! This school and the staffs don't deserve even a single star for review. CHEATS

reviews.review_body: Worst school, Partiality is the other word for st johns .Teachers allow only fair and top students to dance in front very very racist. They treat only christian student properly

reviews.school_name: St. John's English School and Junior College - Besant Nagar
reviews.author: Pooja Ranjan

reviews.school_name: St. John's English School and Junior College - Besant Nagar
reviews.author: Aarush S
reviews.review_body:
I was studying here horrible and dunno who is boy or girl
teachers have lost there IQ  just like this school lost there reputation the principal is one money digger all she wants is money and sits in her office Academically, the school lacks innovation and fails to provide students with a stimulating learning environment.The school's infrastructure is in dire need of renovation, with classrooms and common areas the bathrooms are horrible half of the things are broken Communication between the school and parents is poor using `SMS IN 2024 St. John's fails to provide a well-rounded educational experience through its extracurricular activities.
they don't even have a proper place for the kids to play
before join this school I was getting Straight A in alll the subjects
after join and I get is a C and they give priority for the christian students and they disrespect other cast students and the MATHS  teacher she beats kids and are the teachers lie during the parents teacher meeting I went through depression when I was studying in this school. The teachers are so partial. I  was been bullied, and torched in the class for which I mailed to the principal for which there was no response at all The principal like pm they never meet any parents. I am wondering how it comes 4th place in times of india. All seems to be fake.My real time experience i have seen such a drastical change after studied last two year. I lost my communication skill totally there Not even speak where what. That much poor attention in that. Better they can changed as st johns tamil school. No punctual, no discipline.
I learned a lot of new local tamil words and kids in the class talk bad about other peoples family and the teacher doesn't care about it No extra curricular at all I don't know about  other classes but this school  dosent teach proper english . one of the students talks as if he studied in corporation school this is very dissapointing.They charged 90k for class 9 there are  50-60 students per class , staff are arrogant and i really disappointed that I have joined this school we pay 90K and the fans inside the class are broken not working half of the time hey think that they can make a scholar by giving so much of portions for the exam
one student beat me in the class and we informed the principal
she told we can not do anything because he was a christian student and I ask the principal to tell his parents and pay for my glass which he broke she told why should he pay ? then she is telling me this is the last waring as if I hit him.They are deleting negative feed back and trapping many innocent children here
Finally I changed my school and now she is back as like normal and spoken well.. speedy recovery... thats a good sign of school success..

reviews.school_name: St. John's English School and Junior College - Besant Nagar
reviews.author: reddit browser
reviews.review_body: Posting under a throwaway for obvious reasons. The school management is subpar and outdated. Forget the quality of the teachers(it's a lost cause), the quality of the students are abysmal. I don't want to sound classist or something but in a school which is named english school and junior college you expect there to be a certain standard which they fail to meet . The management seriously needs to think about the students they are admitting. A lot of them straight up behave like ruffians. They're just admitting every riff raff from the street The students are very insecure and just gang on someone who's just minding their own business. The bullying is so bad here and the teachers will side with the bullies and bully you too. Lethargic non chalant teaching staff. Everyone looks like they wanna pick up a fight. I have no idea why this school was so reputed for discipline as there's absolutely no iota of that stuff here And God forbid if you are from outside TN. It's a whole new level of hell.If the message ain't clear enough already, don't join here
